tasks.title: Prepare release package
tasks.description: BREAKING CHANGE RELEASE: Prepare version 1.0.0 with complete removal of UI-based login() function. Update CHANGELOG with breaking changes section.
acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md updated with BREAKING CHANGES section at top
Version confirmed as 1.0.0 (major version bump)
Breaking changes clearly documented: login() function REMOVED
Migration guide reviewed and finalized (MIGRATION.md)
All references to old login() removed from examples
All tests passing (unit, integration, E2E)
Documentation reviewed and complete
package.json version field set to 1.0.0
Git tag prepared: v1.0.0
Release notes emphasize breaking changes first
Rollback instructions documented (how to use 0.2.x if needed)

tasks.title: Build and publish
tasks.description: BREAKING CHANGE RELEASE: Publish version 1.0.0 to npm with prominent breaking change warnings. Announce with migration guide.
acceptanceCriteria: MCP server builds successfully (npm run build)
mcp-server/dist/ contains compiled JavaScript
npm package builds successfully
Package published to npm registry as version 1.0.0
GitHub release created with tag v1.0.0
Release notes START with BREAKING CHANGES section
Release notes include migration guide link prominently
Announcement prepared for users with BREAKING CHANGE warning
Announcement emphasizes: login() function removed, setupTest() required
Announcement includes benefits (5x faster, auto fixtures, caching)
Post-release verification: package installs correctly
Post-release verification: MCP server works in Claude
Post-release verification: setupTest() works as expected
Documentation for 0.2.x archived/tagged for rollback reference
